header.note: The source node in most cases contains the sample message as written by the developer. If it looks like a dot-delimitted string such as "form.label.firstname", then the developer has not provided a default message.

trans-unit.resname: Don't use the name of this application as your password.
trans-unit.source: Don't use the name of this application as your password.
trans-unit.target: Невикористовуйте назву цього додатку, як свій пароль.

trans-unit.resname: The value {{ value }} is not a valid.
trans-unit.source: The value {{ value }} is not a valid.

trans-unit.resname: This value should be greater or equal than Min. booking time
trans-unit.source: This value should be greater or equal than Min. booking time
trans-unit.target: Це значення повинно бути більши або рівне Мін. тривалість бронювання

trans-unit.resname: This value should be lower than Max. booking time
trans-unit.source: This value should be lower than Max. booking time
trans-unit.target: Це значення не повинно бути менше ніж Макс. тривалість бронювання

trans-unit.resname: This value should not be blank
trans-unit.source: This value should not be blank
trans-unit.target: Це значення не повинно бути порожнім

trans-unit.resname: Your password must be at least {{ limit }} characters long
trans-unit.source: Your password must be at least {{ limit }} characters long
trans-unit.target: Пароль повинен бути як мінімум {{ limit }} символів довжиною

trans-unit.resname: Your password should not be the same as your email.
trans-unit.source: Your password should not be the same as your email.
